pi_items.source: task.json description: 'Shaft: Cylindrical, 12 mm diameter, 80 mm long'
task.json description: 'Keyway (rectangular slot cut into the shaft surface): 4 mm wide'
task.json description: 'Keyway: 2.5 mm deep (measured from outer surface)'
Calculated from V = π × r² × h = π × 6² × 80 = 9047.7868 mm³
Expected volume after keyway cut = 9047.8 - (4.0 × 2.5 × 30.0) = 8747.8 mm³, which falls within [8200, 9000]
Consistent with task description and export_result.sh line 8, where OUTPUT_FILE is set to this path

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a cylindrical drive shaft with specifications: 12 mm diameter, 80 mm length. A rectangular keyway (4 mm wide × 2.5 mm deep × 30 mm long) must be cut into the shaft surface. The full cylinder volume without the keyway is 9047.8 mm³. After cutting the 300 mm³ keyway, the expected final volume is 8747.8 mm³, which falls within the tolerance range [8200, 9000] mm³. The completed model must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/drive_shaft_keyway.FCStd. All dimensional specifications in the task metadata are mathematically consistent and correctly derived from the engineering specifications provided in the task description.
